{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''This'' is the home of the Fallanassi? It looks like Abeloth's planet in the Maw!|[[Gavar Khai]]|<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Vortex">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]''</ref>}}
'''Pydyr''', a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Almania]], was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Pydyrian]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==History==
Many [[City/Legends|cities]] on the moon were made of mudbrick decorated in the [[seafah jewel]]s native to Pydyr. The Pydyrians used [[Droid/Legends|droids]] extensively to do the monotonous tasks, making life much easier for them. Their main export was once [[Pydyrian healing stick]]s.

The Pydyrians were represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] just before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by [[Wuja Wojaine]]. Wojaine was arrested for allowing [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian slavers]] to operate in the [[Almanian system]] in exchange for a share of their profits. Despite their wealth and neglect of their impoverished neighbor, [[Almania]], the Pydyrians maintained very lax security on their homeworld.

The [[Almania]]n warlord and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Kueller]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to kill all save 1,000 of the Pydyrians in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. Their homes and valuables were left untouched so that Kueller and his army could carry them off for themselves.

After the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] settled on the almost empty moon, living in peace with the native Pydyrians. However, in [[44 ABY]], a [[Battle in the Fallanassi village|conflict]] occurred when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] were trapped on the moon and pursued by members of the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]], as well as a group of Fallanassi.
